# Office hours — week of <date>

> Standing weekly thread. Pull-based attendance.
> Drop questions, blockers, or "I want a second brain on this" requests here at any point during the week.
> A week with no comments is a good week, not a failed meeting.

## How this works

- Anyone can post a question, blocker, or request for input
- Anyone can answer
- Larger threads can spawn their own discussion or session
- The thread closes Friday — open questions move to next week's thread

## Light artifact

Before closing, the thread captures:

- Questions resolved (linked to answer / commit / PR)
- Questions deferred (and to where)
- Cross-cutting topics that became their own arc / session

## Health signal

Office hours attendance is itself a signal:

- **Heavy**: sessions are not well-framed or blockers are not surfacing early enough
- **Light**: the system is working — sessions and repo memory are carrying the coordination load

---

Drop the first comment to open the week.
